title: Comic-pop — halftone overlay + KAPOW lettering on impacts
hypothesis: Reskin in comic-book pop aesthetic: 8px halftone dots overlay (multiply, alpha 0.14) + warm saturation pop + KAPOW/BOOM/POW lettering spawned on every projectile impact. Genre-bending mobile-game→comics for thumb-stop on TikTok feed.
diff_from_baseline: playable/comic_overlay.js (NEW): applyComicPostFX (halftone + saturation overlay), spawnKapow + drawKapows particle system; canvas-only, no external assets
playable/script.js: import overlay; applyComicPostFX at top of _paintOverlay (skipped on endcard); drawKapows after drawPraiseFloats
scene_exterior/index.js: spawnKapow on every projectile impact (_impactOurs, _impactEnemy, _impactOursDuringResolve)
review_notes: Axis palette respected: KAPOW/BOOM/POW lettering array embedded, multiply composite-op introduced (absent in baseline) for halftone overlay. No gameplay timing changed — overlay attaches at _paintOverlay, kapow spawns piggyback on existing impact handlers. Canvas-only, +1867 bytes, zero assets.
winner_rationale: Maximum thumb-stop differentiation in a TikTok/IG feed (where CPM is brutal and the first 200ms of impression decide scroll-vs-stop). Genre-bending (mobile-game → comics) demonstrates the pipeline's creative range — the hackathon deliverable is the tool, this output proves it can produce non-trivial reskinning. Zero regression on combat loop. Run-2 winner over V1/V2/V4.
